content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 5, 0), (0, 2, 4), (0, 6, 4), (4, 5, 4), (1, 2, 6), (7, 8, 7), (2, 7, 8), (2, 3, 11), (0, 3, 12), (6, 8, 13), (6, 7, 14), (5, 7, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 6.

First, we will go through each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (0, 5, 0) has node 0 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 2, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 6, 4) has node 0 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 5, 4) has node 5 and time 4. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 2, 6) has node 1 and time 6. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (7, 8, 7) has node 7 and time 7. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 7, 8) has node 2 and time 8. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 3, 11) has node 2 and time 11. -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 3, 12) has node 0 and time 12. -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 8, 13) has node 6 and time 13. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (6, 7, 14) has node 7 and time 14. -> Ignore.
* Edge (5, 7, 18) has node 7 and time 18. -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 2 and 8.

Answer: [2, 8]
